description.ko: 심해 정오표 구역의 극한의 수압을 견디며 미지의 신비로운 심해를 기록하기 위해 설계된 첨단 자율 탐사 유닛입니다.
description.en: An advanced autonomous exploration unit engineered to withstand extreme pressures while documenting the untouched mysteries of the deep ocean's midnight zone.

prompt: A high-tech, sleek AQUA-5 underwater drone navigating a dark abyssal trench, emitting soft cyan LED lights that reveal glowing bioluminescent flora and strange deep-sea creatures, cinematic lighting, 8k resolution, photorealistic metallic textures, bubbles rising from mechanical vents, wide-angle lens.
